texto: What is the Christian's responsibility to this world? Is the Christian's responsibility simply, as the "Great Commission" suggests, to share the Good News of God's Kingdom to others, with the goal of making disciples of all nations and perhaps also, along the way, through acts of charity to help meet the material needs of human beings? In other words, is this the only justification for Christian engagement of the larger world?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Dean C.Curry que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “What is the Christian's responsibility to this world? Is the Christian's responsibility simply, a…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, christianity, christian, com foco em reflexao.
